text.title: Single Interview Fast Loop Template Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Single Interview Fast Loop Template application must enforce. These are HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Spec MUST cite ONE decision the interview will inform; multi-decision loops rejected.
rule.rationale: Multi-decision interviews dilute the must-ask budget.

rule.statement: Must-ask list MUST contain ≥3 and ≤5 questions; longer lists become batch interviews.
rule.rationale: Past 5 questions the synthesis deadline slips.

rule.statement: Synthesis MUST land within 36 hours of interview end; later synthesis loses context.
rule.rationale: Memory decays sharply after 36h; transcripts alone don't recover tone.

rule.statement: Every must-ask question MUST be past-tense behavioural; hypothetical questions rejected.
rule.rationale: Hypothetical answers don't predict behaviour even from one respondent.

rule.statement: Synthesis MUST end in a decision artefact (decide / park / re-interview); 'interesting' outcomes rejected.
rule.rationale: Inconclusive outcomes accumulate as unresolved context debt.
